commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a colocated Vitest regression that appends a quota-style assistant transcript during prompt streaming, throws the original provider quota error, and asserts cleanup does not mark the session as a takeover.

PR surface: Tests +51. Total +51 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is present here. The relevant owned transcript-write path is source-readable and the PR adds a mocked regression, but it does not reproduce the original provider quota flow on current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor proof or maintainer override, not an automated repairable code defect.

target.title: test(agents): cover quota prompt takeover regression
target.body:
Summary:
- Adds a focused regression for the #85103 path where an OpenAI Codex quota error writes an assistant error transcript during prompt streaming.
- Asserts the original usage_limit_reached provider error survives and cleanup does not mark the session as an EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError.
- Locks in the owned prompt transcript write handling already present on main.

Testing:
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts

Refs #85103
target.author: grynn
